blended.narrative: Lost Trail is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,798 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
